title: codereview pass 2/3 post-chunk2: Update test/vectors and generate.py to use new hash instead of any CRC for short_addr tests
description: P3 finding: test/vectors/frame.json and generate.py may assume old CRC16 behavior for short address examples. Ensure vectors match new link layer hash for CCP consistency. Discovered during codereview of CCP-15.8.3 pseudocode update.
close_reason: Updated generate.py:1693 and regenerated ccp_load_balancing.json (description now references hash_32/crc32_ieee per CCP-15.8.3; expected_slot=7 matches new computation for EUI 0011223344556677 % 16). Matches updated spec pseudocode and link_ctx.c:96. All vectors/tests pass. Commit 3aa77fde9
